reviews.review_text:
Great spot, good clean workable amenities.
Park well looked after, close to a patrolled beach ⛱️, caught a couple of fish 🐟 for breaky, Cafe 20mtrs from the back gate ☕️🍽 , short walk to Miami tavern 🍺, Coles bit further down or garage 100mtrs away for bits and pieces.
Only thing stopping 5 stars is no wifi 😒

small, nice park.  next to beach through gate at back of park. toilets clean and tidy.  Like many parks on coast it was pricey.  we paid approx $68 per night but only because we stayed 5 and paid for 4. I notice they have 2 night min. Based on price, would not stay again.
A great little van park. The only downside at the moment is the Gold Coast light rail construction going on out front.

Everything was amazing. We were on site OB -03. |Cannot fault park at all. |Amenities, location, cleanliness, staff, sites are all 100%|We will definitely recommend and return. |Also love the size of park.
Close to beach
A little gem. Small, well managed, quiet Park close to the beach and other facilities. Great coffee shop nearby. Looking forward to our next visit.

This would have to be one of the best caravan parks in Australia. Just metres from the beach right in front of the surf lifesaving club  a wonderful corner coffee shop. This caravan park allows you to park your car once and literally never move it again. Walking distance to grocery stores and some amazing beachfront walks in some of the best beachfront parklands in Australia. On site managers are hard-working, welcoming and always with a generous smile and kind attitude. This is seriously one of the most relaxing places to come and visit. Highly recommend.

The best little Boutique Tourist park we've ever stayed at. The managers, Bec and Pete go way above and beyond. The park is immaculate and kept looking lovely for all their guests. They have surfboards to hire, which is covenant as the beach is just across the road. There is a Surf Club and a coffee shop just outside the gate and a long stretch of footpath alongside the beach for an early morning walk.|The park is within walking distance to everything you need, and buses to get you further if need be.|Bec and Pete do an amazing job!!

sauberer kleiner Campingplatz mit allem was man braucht Laundry Campkitchen und super saubere Waschräume zuvorkommende und freundliche Angestellte tolle Lage zum Strand und zu Cafés und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten
This is a well run , very clean caravan park. You feel really welcome as well as safe in the park. We had a great stay and will return next year.
Amazing park with great facilities and lots of planned fun activities.  Best location across fron beach. Bec and Pete go above and beyond for their guests.  We will be back

The staff at reception were kind and friendly and accommodated to our needs.

The park is right on the beach front which was nice for when we did big walks or to go down to the beach.

However, we were parked on plot 29 and people would ride their bikes over our plot to get over the other side (a lot of times kids going round and round).

We found this slightly annoying as we realised they weren’t going over anyone else’s plots and it tended to be around the time we would sit outside to have some food of an evening.

There wasn’t any wifi on park grounds and we were paying $120 a night which we were not satisfied with.

Also, one night there was a power cut while we were making dinner. Nobody came to the site to investigate, we woke up at 3am and realised the power was back on, yet no explanation was given by the team as to why it went off in the first place, at an inconvenient time of evening too.

Overall, we would not stay here again as we
felt it wasn’t worth the value of money.

Our favourite park, quiet, just the sound of the ocean. That’s all you need.|Bec and Pete keep this place clean and tidy and always willing to help.|This is our 5 visit. Definitely back again next year.|David and Lisa Gilmour.

Ocean Beach Tourist Park
We stayed on sites 15 and 16, and they were easily the best in the whole park. The back gate leads straight to a great little coffee shop, and from there it’s only a short stroll to the beach. The water stays shallow for several metres, perfect for kids, and the patrolled area between the yellow flags made it feel even safer. The amount of shells along the shore was incredible.

Pam was wonderful to deal with when booking—so helpful and friendly—and the couple who checked us in were just as lovely. The amenities were clean and well maintained.

There’s no pool or kids’ activities, but honestly, you don’t need them with the beach right there. Our kids had a ball riding around on their scooters.

We’d happily stay here again and again. An awesome spot for a relaxed family getaway.

Great place to stay, we stayed at power site in our caravan and really enjoyed it, amenities are very clean and enjoyable and I would highly recommend this place to stay
Thank you Ocean beach tourist part

Great accommodation. Stayed for 2 nights at a powered site. Amenities are AWESOME! One of the best equipped and maintained sites I have been to.

Awesome location right across from Miami Beach. Quiet and relaxed vibe. Very much a family spot. Will be back when traveling through.
Had a wonderful short stay at this park.|The location and the amenities are superb.|My kids say it's their new favourite campsite and are already bugging us to go back!|Would Highly Recommend!

Great stop off on our Australia tour. Lovely and clean and quiet site.
Toilets etc very clean.
Well positioned and kept very clean. Many customers have returned over multiple years
Great location and great staff

Fantastic campground! Really clean and so close to the beach. Great kitchen as well - best equipped we’ve had on our 4 weeks of camping. Sound of the waves at night fabulous and the beach is great for surfing and playing with the waves. The owners were also absolutely lovely and accomodating!

We absolutely loved out stay here: close to the Beach, clean kitchen&toilets and fair prices :) thanks so much to the manager Pete, he knows about everything in the area and was always helpful and good vibes only. |Cheers Lea & Franz
Very good location, the facilities are always clean and the whole camping place is made to make you feel comfortable.

We had a wonderful experience. My partner and I were on our honeymoon road tripping in our van and rang to see if there was a last minute site for us and to our surprise there was!
When we got there, there was a little bit of confusion with the site being double booked however when we went to speak to the staff, they were incredibly helpful and apologetic (not that they needed to be!! We weren’t phased at all ). We managed to sort it all out and have some laughs and jokes whilst doing it. It was rectified quickly by an awesome team and we had a beautiful stay. A nice small park, right next to the beach. Would 100% go back again!
Thank you for a beautiful stay!

Great location, only across the road to the beach. Amenities were always clean. We used the Lime bikes to get around and it took us 25-30 mins to bike to Surfers Paradise. When we checked in, the receptionist also let us know that there were whales spotted in the sea - which was great to see! 😁
Sand has washed away from concrete slab, damaged our water pump on high edge. Paper information regarding the bus stop changes to transport would have been helpful.

Amazing Caravan Park so fresh and clean and right on the Miami Beach coast our family loved the way we relaxed straight away with such beautiful and friendly people. BBQ area perfect laundry and bathrooms perfect. Surf club and Picolos Cafe right on site. Perfect escape. Thank goodness for Bec and Peter. 🏝️

Super Lage und sauber.
Mit dem Fahrrad ist man gemütlich in 15-20mim in Surfers Paradise. es hat überall Limes, welche man mieten kann.

Second time visiting Ocean Beach Tourist Park on our holiday to Australia (from the Netherlands).

Very nice, quiet campsite. Just cross the street and you’re on the beach. Amenities are always clean too!

Campeggio molto curato e ben tenuto posizione strategica
Servizi molto puliti
I gestori sono molto gentili e disponibili
Ottimo

We had a great time at Ocean Beach tourist park for 9 nights. Small park on the beach... just lovely! I was a bit worried before coming to the GC during school holidays that it would be crowded and hectic like other caravan parks but it truly felt tucked away and peaceful. Bec and Pete were amazing managers. Pancake brekky and sausage sizzle on grandfinal night were fantastic touches on what would have already been a great stay! Thank you!
Greg and Nicole
Honestly best park we have stayed at. Camp kitchen has all you need, Bathrooms are really clean and modern, Laundry facilities are great. It is quiet and a very short walk from the beach

Bec and Pete are your ideal park managers. We have just finished our second holiday at Ocean Beach and can’t wait to book again. It’s a great little park in a pretty busy part of the Gold Coast, but the best part is that you feel so far away from the business and traffic. You have a beautiful beach out front, cafes and shops in walking distance, huge clean sites and great amenities. It’s a safe park where our kids can scooter around and  play with other families. Definitely recommend!

A fabulous CP close to the beach, walking /cycling track. A smaller park with spotless amenities. Sites are big although a little tight in places. The artificial turf and concrete pads make it clean and tidy. The park is within close distance to restaurants, cafes and shopping. Bec & Pete do a wonderful job and are welcoming and friendly. Made our stay there very enjoyable. Looking forward to 2026.
Nice on the creek. Can be windy.

Absolute Managing staff were of great assistance throughout our visit, with the lead up upon booking to finally catching our breath and getting to share this Absolutely Amazing View.
Accessibility for the disabled community via ramps to cabin may need to be considered for revising.
If you're fortunate enough, migration season will bring an Oceanfront View to seeing a Mother Whale and Calf or even a pod of playful dolphins....... Even those chilled start up to a kinda day eary ocean fog. Magical 🪄All in all:
What's Not To 💛
WHAT A VIEW!!!!
AS SHOWN IN ATTACHED PHOTOGRAPHS. Located within walking distance from your accomodation is Hairdresser, Corner Convenience Shop/Takeaways, Pharmacy and not forgetting Bargara Lakes Tavern *Bus stops located along Woongarra Scenic Road entrance (short walk to Tavern) Public Transport available (Bus Service  Mon-Sat only) Other transport options enquire at booking with Administration Team. 😊

With Thanks, Appreciation and Looking forward to returning to this Lil Piece of Paradise.

Wendy & Sal's (Assistance Dog 🐕‍🦺) with help from Daughter Luella 🌻💛👍

Cozy cabins were a lot smaller than we were led to believe.  No way 6 people could fit in these cabins. The verandah covering was only part way across with hardly any cover from the rain. Toilet was faulty and needed to be adjusted a few times to make it flush. Pool and slide area was  fun but pool area is not supervised so trying to get a spot in the spa was difficult with the 15 kids and 5 adults in there at once (Spa only meant to have 8 people at a time)  Unsupervised children turning the Spa off and on constantly made for an unpleasant experience.  The camp kitchen was clean and well presented but was taken over by a number of families having a party so only 1 table out of the 6 was available.  All 3 ovens were in use by said party and we waited over an hour to use one.  (Grumpy/hungry kids by then) The playground was great.  Not sure if I would return.  Not really sure if you can call it a holiday park when you have permanent residence.
We love it it’s so clean , staff are beautiful highly recommend love it got Notting to say bad it .

Large, pet friendly grassy powered sites
Beautiful pool area, fantastic amenities
As relaxed or as busy as you wish!!
And here comes the 3pm train! Whoo whoo
Absolutely stoked with the location, facilities and service so far! The food at Nibbles was great and well priced.
Great caravan park! Amazing facilities for the kids.

Family of 5 (2A, 3C) staying on a Premier Evergreen site and honestly—what’s not to love? The amenities, location, and facilities are all top-notch, and the staff are so friendly and welcoming. The kids are already asking when we can come back!

The value for money is incredible—the water park and pool alone are worth the site fees. 🌴
Great place to go with kids, there is lots to do and everything is very well maintained. Just be warned, because it is right next to the highway you hear cars all night long
Highly recommend!
4th time at the big 4 Gold Coast holiday park, and it never disappoints! Love the facilities for kids, as well has most awesome camp kitchen, so much for kids to do! Will be back many more times!
Greta park for a quick family staycation close to home. The kids love it here. Can’t fault their amenities & service. Recommend
Love this place
A very fun park! Easy check in and lovely service from the girls at the front desk. Swimming pool, waterpark and spa pool kept the kids entertained even on a rainy day! ❤️ Thanks Big4 Gold coast!
Cant comment on rooms, got a camp-site. Great customer service.
Would like laundry in the villas

Great overall experience kids love the pool even with rain and colder weather
+++ ordering food from cabanas and not having to go wait in line to pickup
Only down side car parks are to small when next to others
This is the most amazing facilitated caravan park ive ever  stayed at they have thought of everything its pure luxury the food is sensational and doggy friendly a big five stars from me

it’s our second time staying at the big 4 in Helensvale and I can honestly say it’s even better than the first! During our previous stay the cafe had a restricted menu due to upgrades but is now open. Food is great, staff are friendly and facilities are second to none!! We will definitely be back for future stays!
We absolutely love this place and have just booked again for November - the facilities, staff and rooms are incredible and great proximity to everything you need!!
Great stay as always. Even with a considerable amount of rain we all still had a great time

Weq Currently staying at Gold Coast Holiday Park and I figured I’d write this review while I actually have 30 seconds of peace… which tells you everything you need to know already.

First up — this place is dangerous. Not in a bad way… but because my kids have now decided this is the standard for all future holidays. Thanks for setting the bar ridiculously high.

From the minute we arrived, it’s been smooth sailing. Check-in was easy, staff are absolute legends, and the park is so clean and well kept it feels like someone’s following us around tidying up (if that’s the case, thank you — please come home with me).

The kids? Haven’t stopped. Between the water park, playgrounds, and just running around like they’ve had 14 Red Bulls, they are absolutely loving life. I’ve seen them briefly… usually when they need food… or money… or both.

Amenities are spotless — and I mean “double-checking if they’re brand new” level clean. Big tick.

Location is spot on too. Close enough to everything on the Gold Coast, but far enough away that you’re not dealing with constant chaos. It’s the perfect mix of fun and actually being able to relax.

Overall vibe: family-friendly, super well run, and somehow still relaxing for adults… which feels like a rare achievement when kids are involved.

Anyway, I’d keep writing… but I’ve just been called back to duty as the official snack provider.

We’ll 100% be back — assuming we ever manage to convince the kids to Currently staying at Gold Coast Holiday Park and I figured I’d write this review while I actually have 30 seconds of peace… which tells you everything you need to know already.

From the minute we arrived, it’s been smooth sailing. Check-in was easy, staff are absolute legends, and the park is so clean and well kept it feels like someone’s following us around tidying up (if that’s the case, thank you — please come home with me).

The kids? Haven’t stopped. Between the water park, playgrounds, and just running around like they’ve had 14 Red Bulls, they are absolutely loving life. I’ve seen them briefly… usually when they need food… or money… or both.

Amenities are spotless — and I mean “double-checking if they’re brand new” level clean. Big tick.

Location is spot on too. Close enough to everything on the Gold Coast, but far enough away that you’re not dealing with constant chaos. It’s the perfect mix of fun and actually being able to relax.

Overall vibe: family-friendly, super well run, and somehow still relaxing for adults… which feels like a rare achievement when kids are involved.

Anyway, I’d keep writing… but I’ve just been called back to duty as the official snack provider.

We’ll 100% be back — assuming we ever manage to convince the kids to This is the 7th time we have stayed here. As always the service is amazing the facilities and amenities are well maintained and the staff are friendly. Our children always enjoy themselves as there is so much to do no time to be bored. We will be returning again for sure. Alissia

We travelled from Melbourne to qld and stayed with a few different parks and this is by far my favourite. We will definitely be back.
This park has everything to offer for kids and family.
There's a reason why big4 is rated the best parks in Australia.

This is basically staying somewhere with a built in babysitter!! What an amazing park with so much for the kids to do, they are entertained the whole time and you can relax by the pool with a cocktail in hand! and if you bring your furry friend there is even an on site doggy day care. We will definitely be back to visit in future.
Great place to holiday, great facilities and staff are amazing and always available to help.

Fantastic place to stay! Beautiful pool area and super fun water park. Rooms are very clean and comfortable, had everything we needed. Staff were lovely, went above and beyond to make our stay more enjoyable. 10 out 10, highly recommend.
Our 4th time staying at Big 4 Gold Coast, rooms always neat and clean and amenities are good. Pool and water park always a hit for the kids. Will definitely be back again.
So far my family are loving it been on the go-karts this morning been in the pool it’s such an amazing place to stay recommend it to everyone

This is a great place to come with kids. Everything is very kid friendly and well designed. We stayed in a 2 bedroom terrace right near the water park and cafe. It was great to be close to all the main facilities. We went during the week (not on school holidays) and it was very quiet. If you have little kids, call ahead and check the height restrictions for the water park, there are some slides that are off limits to shorter children. But all round an awesome stay!
Stayed here with our van. Great location to visit all the theme parks. Staff are super friendly and helpful. Waterpark is next level !

Stayed in a Family Cabin (3 Adults, 3 Children). The rooms were very clean, Location is great. Map was marked clearly and reception staff gave clear directions on how to get from reception to the cabin.

Pool was great and clean, waterpark was fun with lifeguards ready on every floor.

My children thoroughly enjoyed themselves.
The girls in the cafe were very friendly and helpful. The breakfast burger was massive and messy😎
Family friendly, even your four legged friends are welcomed and catered for... Highly recommended the stay...

We had a fantastic stay at the Gold Coast Big 4. The park is tidy, modern, and really well maintained, which made it feel comfortable from the moment we arrived. The water park was a standout — perfect for keeping the kids entertained and a great feature of the park.
The location is very convenient with easy access in and out, making it a great base for exploring the area. Our caravan site was generously sized, and we especially enjoyed the evergreen turf sites — they looked great and made the space feel a bit more premium.
Overall, a really enjoyable stay and we’d definitely come back.
Very neat, tidy and modern with all the amenities you need to make your stay enjoyable. Kids had a great time…
Very happy first time visitor will return, excellent for young families

Amazing place, position, service only sadness is no pets allowed, wish there was an area where limited sites (for pets were allowed) even if they have strict conditions, they are part of the family and only reason I can make this my holiday destination

This is a great little park nestled in a perfect location, amenities are clean and modern. Great little camp kitchen.  Short walk out the back gate onto the beach or enjoy a coffee at the cafe next door.  Close enough to shops, restaurants and activities.  Would definitely add you your list.

Next to the beach, what more do you need.
It's been a while since we have been here. It's still great place to stay, local to many clubs and pubs, walkways and the sea, of course.

Bec and Pete do an amazing job running Ocean Beach Tourist Park…they are to be highly commended for their quality service, well maintained facilities and super friendly vibe. They are always happy to help you out with any changes or questions (which is surprisingly rare nowadays!) They totally deserved winning the top spot in the 2025 ReviewPro People’s Choice Caravan Park of the Year Award and officially being named the #1 caravan park in the country!

Top location right on Miami beachfront…surrounded by lush bushland and sheltered by the headland, the park is surprisingly quiet and peaceful even though it is just off the Gold Coast Highway. Close to several different shopping and dining options….Burleigh Heads, Miami Marketta, Palm Beach, Pacific Fair. The best part is waking up to the sound of the ocean, walking out the front gate, grabbing a coffee and then doing the beachfront walk along Miami Beach. Perfect 🤩 10/10 🏄🏼‍♀️👙🩳🌳🌊
Picture perfect place to stay, Cabins are lovely, with the beach as your view from your balcony.
After a long day on the road, we luckily found the last available site.  However, $69 a night is a lot to pay for a lukewarm shower.
Great smaller park, good size caravan sites, a bit tight to get though,  good clean amenities

We stayed here after a week in Broadwater for Broadbeach blues festival 2025. Great location if you want to relax.. it's a smaller quieter tourist park for the older traveller, which we loved. We'd definitely stay again and would recommend for friends and family to stay. Easy walking between Miami and Burleigh, close to North Burleigh sufe club for a cold beer and a great meal.

We’ve been coming to Ocean Beach Tourist Park for years, mostly camping in our Van but we have stayed in the Cabins as well. Staff are wonderful, very helpful & nothing is too
much trouble.

We stayed on a powered site for four nights which was covered in astro turf. It was awesome. I wish more parks used this. Toilets where clean and modern. Sites are very generous but the small road between them.makes it tight to get into the site or out etc. . We will definitely be back

Entspannter Campingplatz direkt am Strand.
Wir haben 69 AUD gezahlt, und direkt vor Ort spontan gebucht!

Pros: right in front of great beach, nice staff, cafe on the corner, clean amenities
Cons: no indoor / covered communal area, very small camp kitchen only big enough for one family, tiny sites and narrow roadways (a glorified carpark)

5 Stars – Perfect Powered Site Stay!
We stayed at a powered site and couldn’t be happier. The park is incredibly clean and well-maintained. Pete and Beck are absolute legends – the perfect managers! Friendly, helpful, and really make you feel at home.
The beach access is right across the street, sunrise is the best! We’ll definitely be back!
Clean ammenities and very friendly staff. We definitly recommend!

This caravan park was absolutely beautiful.
Location- it's backs straight onto a lovely patrolled beach, great for walking and swimming. It is a short uber ride or hire bike ride to the city. Walking distance to coles/Aldi and other convinience stores, as well as cafes and restaurants.

Service - the lovely people who run the park are beautiful, so friendly and helpful. There was organised live music and food truck. Other activities for the kids through out the weekend.
The amenities where clean and tidy, showers where lovely, hot and good water pressure.
The park was clean, the slabs and turf made a great tidy camp site. Power on the site worked well as did the running water. All night were really quiet, and no noise past 10:00(latest).

Sehr gute Lage... Leider kein Platz für Palmen etc.
Preis etwas hoch... Großartige reception, seeeehr bemüht und hilfreich!!!

We had a fantastic family stay at BIG4 Holiday Parks. The park was clean, well maintained, and perfect for families.

There was so much for the kids to do with great pools, playgrounds, and plenty of space to play, which made our stay so enjoyable and relaxing.

Our accommodation was comfortable, practical, and had everything we needed. Staff were friendly and welcoming throughout.

The location was also great, close to major attractions while still feeling like a holiday getaway. We made beautiful family memories and would happily stay again. Highly recommend for families
Loved our terrace and the location! Perfect getaway for our fam of 3 :)

We had a booking for the weekend, we had to cancel as I was admitted to ER and quite ill. When emailed big 4 I was pointed at the cancellation rules so we lost $460 3 day powered ensuite site. Shame on you GC big 4
Eda
Clean facilities and very spacious sites for caravans.
super friendly staff,  clean and well maintained amenities and the park and water park is awesome.

We are having such a great stay at BIG4 Gold Coast! Late check-in was super easy and stress-free, which made arriving with kids a breeze. We were also lucky enough to receive an upgrade to a beautiful 3-bedroom Oasis Villa—such a lovely surprise and absolutely perfect for our family.

The poolside breakfast was delicious and a highlight of our stay. Overall, everything felt relaxed, easy, and well thought out. We can’t wait to book again!
It’s the best caravan park we have stayed at! Service was perfect they even escort you to your site. It is kid heaven so much to do. The bathrooms were superb! Cleanest I have seen. Highly recommend
Cabin was spacious for 7 people.  Cafe had a great selection of food. The kids enjoyed the pool, watermark and playground. Would highly recommend.

Great holiday park, the kids loved the pool and water park. Very unique.
The staff are friendly and helpful and the booking process was seamless.
The bungalow was great value and heaps of room for the family, very clean inside. Just many spiders around the outside 🕷️ ha

It's waking distance from the main parksn and some restaurants and there's a bus stop at the front that goes through all the theme parks and to the main tram/train line which takes you to the coast and everywhere else. Super convenient location!

There are tesla chargers available, i assume for free. Great if you're planning a trip with an EV.

Will be coming back next time

Great location for all things Gold Coast!
Staff are exceptional and facilities are clean and look newly renovated

Lots of current renovations but doesn’t impact your stay at all

Camp sites a little close together but easy to set up and clean all around

The park is super clean, well maintained, and has a really relaxed, family-friendly vibe. The sites are spacious and easy to get into, even with a decent-sized van.
The facilities are a standout amenities are spotless, the camp kitchens are well set up, and there’s plenty to keep the kids entertained with pools, playgrounds, and activities. It’s clear the staff take pride in the place because everything runs smoothly and feels looked after.
Location is also a big plus, close to the theme parks and not far from shops, but still quiet enough to unwind.
Overall, it’s one of those parks you actually look forward to coming back to. Would definitely stay again 👍
Great location. Neat park

We’re on our second trip to Big4 Gold Coast, and we come because there are so many things for our kids to do, but it’s also completely possible to have time out. The cabins are set up well to house families, the activities and open times for the water park ate well timed, and the cafe is well stocked for everyone to find something to eat.
The cleanliness lives a lot to be desired, but overall it’s a pleasant stay for all involved.

We have a premier evergreen site, they are a huge size giving us room to actually be comfortable, so close to all of the amenities and the offerings available are endless! We are loving our time here!

So much for the kids to do, the water slides and pool were a hit. Staff are super friendly. Was also able to get a good deal on theme park tickets.

Con is the noise from the highway is quite loud and constant. Not a deal breaker though.

Kids can’t wait to stay again.

Such an amazing place to stay! The villas are clean, spacious and quiet. Pool slide area massive hit with the kids and so close to movie world and wet and wild! Perfect. Already planning our next trip :)

This is a tough park to review. You really cant fault the service or facilities, however there are a few things to mention.
The traffic noise in the morning from the motorway is next level horrendous. I'm not talking about a little bit of noise, I'm talking about trucks, hooning motorbikes and the drone of traffic waking you up from around 4am every morning. Now I understand this is hardly the fault of the park, hover it needs to be mentioned for those seeking a quieter experience.
If you don't love kids, this isn't the place for you. We did have kids and again, this park is obviously marketed towards families however a few things need consideration. Parents are largely absent, and there is a real danger with the speed at which children fly around on e-scooters and e-bikes in between cars and caravans. I myself took a spill after a young kid rode his scooter through the amenities block area (despite the signs) and took me out trying to avoid another kid. There is certainly not enough emphasis or signage and I believe further rules around enforcement of e-bikes and e-scooters are required. We witnessed many close calls with kids and vehicles.
Great facilities and everything you need is there, but as this is incredibly tight and busy, more rules and enforcement is required.

Amazing park. Family has really enjoyed it.

Well worth it!!

Great location. Kids can fish down the back. Excellent facilities and a very convenient location.

Thanks everyone.

From the crosses.

Wow, what an amazing park!
We honestly underestimated the amount of facilities on offer, we didn't even need to book any activities outside of the park had we known.
Our children are absolutely in their element.
Guter Platz zum Stehen mit dem Wohnmobil. Saubere Toiletten und Duschen und direkt am Beach. Nachts sehr ruhig!

From arrival to departing. Bec an Peter ensure you are happy. Facilities are lovely an clean. Very close to beach, public transport, clubs an shops. We also stayed in a cabin an wow - the only thing you need to bring is food drinks an a smile. Very relaxing tourist park.

Amazing location
Loved my stay there all staff are wonderful

We had a great experience in this camp site. We had been travelling in a camper for over a week and this was our last stop. And we were blown away with the site, definitely the best one we have been in by far. Lovely clean amenities perfect location. And most of, all such helpful lovely staff. Especially Pete who was so quick to help us when we had an issue with our camper. He didn’t even hesitate to help and he was our hero. Couldn’t recommend this campsite enough to anyone:) thank you guys 🫶🏻
Very nice van park on the beach front almost visiting rellies

Wonderful small caravan park across from the beach.  Amenities are very good and cleaned well.  Above all else, the Managers and staff are a delight to meet and deal with.  Do yourself a favour and give it a try....you'll be happy you did.

Our yearly holiday with our family and friends is so special here at ocean beach tourist park.
Our kids can safely ride around, easy walk to the beach, clean accessible amenities and wonderful staff. We love that there are no play grounds or games room it’s just good old fashioned camping.
We love that each year we can rebook our sites and stay with our group. This is our 4th year and we will keep coming back.
Nice campsite next to the beach.

The caravan park is located just two steps from the beach, the spots are quite big and people at reception are very kind. The kitchen is nice and clean, the toilets as well. Every time they organise an activity they send a reminder by sms. In particular, we appreciated the text message mentioning that the forecast predicted hail. Thanks!

This is the best Caravan Park on the Gold Coast. The site is immaculately clean, the staff are amazing and the atmosphere for kids is exemplary. Our stays here are the best. The management staff (Bec and Pete) go way above and beyond to make your stay enjoyable and provide so many amazing experiences/activities for the kids. They even have a free pancake breakfast morning each week (where else do you find such wonderful people on the Gold Coast) Highly recommend this site.

Congested park. No play area or pool for kids. Next to beach. Kitchen has BBQ, stove, microwave and fridge but no cutlery, crockery or pans for cooking. Reasonably clean amenities. Great for campervans and motorhomes. Not ideal for camping.
Great spot right on the beach
Great location for a relaxing weekend, clean amenities and very friendly staff.

This is a lovely,small, extremely well run park . The staff ,reception , cleaning
and ground staff are all so  lovely and the park is really well cared for. Love the herb and fairy garden . There is alot of love in this park and we love it in return. Have been before ,here again and we  will return .

What an awesome place stayed here for 3 weeks staff were very friendly amenities  and camp kitchen  very  clean. 5 outta 5 Amanda in reception  was extremely exceptional  recommend staying at this park.
This is a five star place, Bec is lovely, place is clean and tidy and fabulous location. Will definitely be back.

We stayed here in our previous motorhome around 6 years ago and it was so great that we have returned to stay for three nights in our new motorhome.  The only downfall was of course the noise during the night from the making of the new tram line and roadworks.  The upside is that the park is in a fantastic location.  We didn’t have a tow car with us this time but it was only a short walk to the supermarket & eateries and the beach is right at the back of the park.
Other holidaymakers were super friendly and we shared many chats.
A very well-maintained park with friendly and staff. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Everything at this park is great except for it being a Telstra black hole and no internet availability.
Hermoso lugar para pasar unos días relajado.

This year was our seventh year coming here and we absolutely love the park. However  very disappointed with the effort made enforcing the park rules.
There is a total ban on electric bikes and scooters, no riding after dark and all kids must wear helmets.
They’re literally electric bikes and scooters  everywhere. No kids are wearing helmets and there are bikes and scooters everywhere after dark.
The whole stay we were genuinely concerned for the safety of our children and my elderly parents.
The security guard driving round at night is doing nothing to enforce these rules and the text message sent to parent seems to be completely ineffective.
I’m very concerned that it’s going to take somebody seriously getting hurt before anything is done about this.
Great park, well maintained and a great location. great for a swim every day and just a short trip to Burleigh heads for resturants, cafes, food and supplies
What a amazing place to stay 13 years |I have made some amazing friends that we know call family.
Great location and activities. Friendly, helpful staff.
I'm in caravan.  But I do believe the accommodation is very good. Close to shops. Public transport right outside the park. 10 minute walk to the ocean

Incredible park and location but wouldn’t recommend the unpowered camp sites.
They were tiny and we had a tree in the middle of ours so it was challenging to fit.
The noise from the road at night was absolutely horrendous and the bathrooms were miles away.
The cabins and powered camp sites are epic though. Worth paying for the better sites.

Location location location!! This park is amazing. Best location right on the creek, grounds are kept looking tidy, amenities were clean, kids loved the pool and slides and the reception staff at check in were so welcoming and friendly. They even have a fully stocked kiosk! Thanks for making our family stay so much fun.
Such a great park, my 6yo is up and out the door as soon as he opens his eyes... bikes, creek and pool with some park activities on school holidays. Not much better then Tally creek when it's on.
We had the best Easter at Tallebudgera caravan park over Easter - family friendly , great layout and amenities , 2 pools - kids loved the water slides and the friendliest staff - highly recommend
Clean Park, all of the Staff are friendly

Great Location on the iconic Tallebudgera Creek. Close to shops, ocean Beach, scenic walks and Surf Club with fantastic views and food. We had an ensuite Powered Caravan Site and it was large and well maintained.|Staff were very friendly and more than helpful
Stellar spot, staff and on site kiosk great. The kids and adults loved it! Even at Easter the park was clean and even had security.
Iconic location close to Beach, scenic walks and surf club with good food and cold drinks.
Beautiful clean happy venue with space to enjoy the coast
Amazing site, the amenities were always clean and well looked after. No issues at all. Pool is amazing. 5*

This is hands down one of the best caravan parks around. The staff are friendly, accommodating and always ready to help. Scott is also a legend and managed to help us out and made sure we had the best family stay! Thanks team!
Scott’s awesome

Last minute booking here and our experience from the time we booked was beautiful. Every staff member we encountered were super friendly and went out of their way to make us and our boys feel welcomed. The amenities are absolutely spotless. Park is small but it has everything you need including a patrolled beach just out the back! Would recommend to all.

Would have to be the cleanest park on the coast . . The girls in the office were so nice and really helped us out when we needed to change our bookings  .. it’s a busy park because it’s a great spot !

This park is just fantastic, from the location, amenities, and more importantly the staff , the staff are committed and work tirelessly to ensure the park visitors have a positive memorable stay, we have stayed in both our caravan and cabins at the park , coming from Victoria to regularly catch up with family in Burleigh, we wouldn't stay anywhere else , well done Bec , Pete and Amanda and ground staff , thank you

Stayed 3 nights in an on-site cabin and although the location is great, not sure we’ll be back.

Pros: - Amazing location, beach right across the road, surf club on the corner, close to shops
- Ladies at reception were lovely
- Affordable compared to some other stays
- Comfortable beds and great shower

Cons: - Cleanliness wasn’t the best, mould on curtains, in sink and shower. Very dusty, thick layer on fans and visible on walls.
- Weren’t able to lock the cabin door throughout stay, reception did try and fix the problem but were unsuccessful
- No phone service inside cabin
- Lost power and weren’t able to contact reception to fix the problem due to office hours
- Carpark directly outside cabin had trucks and cars coming and going at all hours of the night
- Entire cabin needs a refresh, very old, run down, worn furniture

We had a powered site for 3 nights and the service we received from Amanda by special mention was amazing . Not just with us but other guests to . Wonderful with the kids and so accommodating to any request we had . Will be coming back for sure !

Our family has had the most wonderful experience at Ocean Beach Caravan Park. The managers have created such a fun and friendly environment. We've had pancake breakys, movie nights, arts and craft mornings, it's truly been amazing for our whole family. Such a great location and always clean and tidy. We love it!
Absolutely amazing park from the amenities to the ground and office staff. Quiet safe and friendly environment. Thank you.

I had a terrible experience at this caravan park. The man and lady (Amanda) spoke to me with the most disrespect I have ever experienced. Everyone had told me to go to Broadwater, and I should’ve listened. The staff made me feel uncomfortable and unwelcome. I will definitely never be going back and will make sure to spread the word because it was atrocious.

I rarely write reviews (this is the second in 10 years) but these guys deserve a big thumbs up. The caravan park is extremely clean with really lovely attention to detail in the presentation. Bec and Pete were the best managers/hosts I’ve ever seen - not only very friendly and helpful (I was a first time caravan-er) but they were fantastic with the kids. It was school holidays and they made up for not having a pool/games room etc with doing daily activities with the kids, lending them scooters/bikes etc. My kids made lots of new friends and by the end my 5 & 8 year old were begging to come back for Christmas holidays. Highly recommend - only down side is the roadworks adjacent to the park.

Last min booking to get the kids away.
Site was great. Facilities super clean. Right on the beach. The people who run this place make it, some mornings they cook pancakes for the kids, they have a movie night for the kids and are feeding them popcorn and marshmallows, rock painting, and a koala hunt for chocolate. Great hosts !

Some of the best customer service we've come across. We had to change our booking quite a few times and Bec was super accomodating. Never felt like we were putting her out.

Awesome location! Right on the beach, close to Burleigh, about 6 playgrounds within walking distance, as well as a shopping complex.

The park has a great vibe. Everyone was super friendly. Fairy garden and kids corner kept the kids entertained.
Love this park.

Honestly don’t know why you’d stay anywhere else. The park is on the beach, coffee at the gate, right next to the headland, extremely affordable for a family and the customer service is unreal. Our kids had a hoot and we found it to be super relaxing and enjoyable. THANKS HEAPS!!

What a wonderful park to stay in . We were on a powered site . Great location across from the beach , walking to cafes , surf clubs and shops . First time staying here to catch up with friends , we will be back as it is so friendly and the managers Pete and Bec are so welcoming and provided social nights and games to mingle with other guests ! Amenities are sparkling clean .
Love the location which is very close to the patrolled beach, facilities was perfect, clean, and comfortable. I will be definitely be staying here again.

Amazing location - easily the best site we stayed in across Australia. Definitely worth the money.

Service was so good, not enough nice words to say about Becky and Pete

Great staff
Extremely helpful and friendly
Excellent position right on the beach

My wife and myself stayed here for 2 weeks. In our van. Fantastic park. One of the best we’ve stayed in. Management couldn’t be more helpful. Very clean amenities. Very good sites . Would thoroughly recommend this caravan park.
This caravan park should be the bench mark for all parks. Staff, amenities and location, all first class.
We have loved our stay so far! Excellent facilities and such friendly staff
Absolutely brilliant park with excellent facilities within a short distance to theme parks..   could not ask for a park in its location. Great work guys 👌
What a fantastic park, so close to everything you need! The service has been amazing - so friendly and accommodating. The park is awesome, the waterslides get a big tick from our kids!

What a place! We haven’t been for years and were pleasantly surprised by all the upgrades. The kids (and big kids at heart!) are loving the water slides, the park and daily activities. All with the bonus of amazing food and drinks on site. We’ll definitely be back!
Very helpful staff, great amenities, and a fabulous place for kids. The water park is awesome! Highly recommended for a family getaway, especially so close to the theme parks.
We are so relaxed and loving our stay
Amazing place with amazing facilities. Great for family fun!!

Incredible resort-style stay with the charm of a caravan park. The resort suite was surprisingly luxurious, sleeping up to 10 with three full bathrooms — perfect for families. Great facilities, especially the water slide park, plus excellent food from Nibbles Café and the woodfired pizza. Super convenient location near the theme parks. Easily could have stayed longer.

Family of 6- 2 adults 4 children .
First time staying at big4 holiday park and we travelled from Sydney. Our kids are having the time of their lives. We are loving the pool and water slides ! Kids have enjoyed the jumping pillow too. We are about to head out to the karts and I know our family will have the best time on the karts too!
Great place for a family holiday
Booked for a little camping getaway, facilities were awesome kids had a good time loved the water park and little bit of quiet time fishing
Great camp spot!! Staff are very accommodating and friendly! All amenities are clean and well taken care of!

We had a fantastic stay at Gold Coast Holiday Park BIG4. The facilities were clean and well maintained, the staff were friendly and helpful, and there was plenty to keep the kids entertained. The location is great, close to everything but still peaceful. We’ll definitely be back!

We have spend a couple of days at the park so far. The staff have been polite  and very helpful. Love having a Cafe on-site. Rooms clean, modern and very relaxing. The cabanas are great at the pool but should have a time limit.
Nice size park great amenities, large sites.
Staff are friendly and helpful. Motel room is clean and fresh, close to park facilities and theme parks.
Very happy with this park good service kept clean well maintained staff is always friendly amenities are immaculate especially love the kitchen would come back to this place again and again

Easy to see why it is one of the best parks in the country. Clean, well-maintained, all the usual things the kids love plus construction making more. And the water slides! Only thing you could maybe fault is the noise from the highway. If we were in the van and near the front id probably hear it but this time we are in a villa (and the villa is exceptional) so I have literally only positive things to say about this park.

Incredible park, the managers are fantastic too. Right on the ocean 🏝
Seriously great 👍

Wir waren an diesem Ort mit unserem Wohnmobil und waren überrascht wie schön es ist. Tagsüber gab es Bauarbeiten auf den Straßen aber nachts war es sehr ruhig. Und wenn man mit Kindern diesen Ort besucht hat man das Glück, dass jeden Tag eine andere Veranstaltung für die kleinen stattfindet. Wir kommen gern wieder und empfehlen diesen Ort.

Stayed here for a few years now in both tent and cabins. Amazing spot, so close to the beach. Amenities always spotless. Last but not least the hospitality of the manager’s Bec and Pete is second to none. Sausage sizzles, arts and crafts for the kids, pancake breakfast, live music and more. You will 10/10 enjoy your stay here. We come back every year because of this!
We love our home away from home, Pete and Becky are just lovely host. 🥰

It’s my favourite place from the first impression in the reception with Super friendly staff and very helpful, then the campground and the Villa and the location is Amazing then as you get out the Sand beach is so beautiful. Will definitely come back.
Beautifully maintained  park with  super friendly  staff,  loved the centre row of  artificial turfed sites.
Super Campingplatz am Strand in einer sehr guten Gegen von Gold Coast. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und die Infrastruktur sauber. Alles bestens! Wir können den Platz empfehlen!
Sehr saubere Toiletten und Wäschezimmer. Der Campingplatz wirkt immer aufgeräumt. Die Besitzer sind herzlich und hilfsbereit. Was will man mehr?

Schon bei der Ankunft haben wir uns willkommen gefühlt. Die Mitarbeitenden sind sehr höflich, gut gelaunt und hilfsbereit. Unser Stellplatz war sehr gross und die ganze Anlage war ausgesprochen sauber (inkl sanitäre Anlagen). Der wunderschöne Strand ist nur einen Steinwurf entfernt. Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind zu Fuss erreichbar. Wir haben die Ruhe sehr genossen - der Ocean Beach Touristpark ist wirklich eine Oase!
Great spot for a summer holiday.  Across from the beach and so central.
Wonderful place to stay in my caravan, easy access to a patrolled beach and great facilities nearby

An absolute must for a fantastic Caravan park experience. Very big sites. Extremely clean and well maintained amenities and within walking distance of everything you need, including Dan Murphy’s, Aldi, Coles and only 50 meters from the beach. It’s a small park with 62 sites but one of the best on the Gold Coast. We will definitely be back next year and highly recommend you give it a try. The park management are extremely friendly and helpful.

We were pleasantly surprised by this little park.

Super friendly, accommodating staff and very clean amenities.

The park is right next to the beach and cycleway/running path. From the park Broadbeach is a flat 4km cycle into the action.

No activities or pool here for kids but when you're just basing yourself at the park to do other GC activities, it has all you need.

We particularly liked the large artificial turf sites.

Thanks for having us!

Wow!  This place was a really nice surprise.  Stayed for 2 nights and could have done more. We usually don't like staying in urban areas but once you get settled in here it's so easy to forget where you are.  The nearby bluffs and beach really help with that feeling.  Amenities were great. Sites were nice and big and we didn't feel crowded in together.  Highly recommend the 9 minute walk to the Quade coffee shop rather than the one next door.  Excellent walking in the area.  The views from the nearby bluffs are absolutely stunning. Cost was $62AUD per night for powered site, no pad
Best kept park we stayed at and a perfect location! First time stay but certainly not the last!

Bec was amazing, we had problems with our car and couldn’t make the reservation and we were able to switch it to a day later which was amazing! Perfect location!! Lovely campground! Can only recommend! ♥️

Great park, opposite beach, walking distance to Aldi, Coles, Dan Murphy etc. The managers are an absolute delight to deal with,  they keep the park clean and tidy. Our caravan site was spacious, with fake grass covering it. Highly recommend this Park.

I have only been here for a couple days but it's pretty nice so far. My only complaints would be that the window in the bathroom seems to be broken because there's no way to latch it closed so it keeps springing open which has been a bit annoying and the blinds aren't enough to make the room dark enough to get to sleep very easily especially since there is a light right outside the windows that we can't turn off. Very cool water park though and super easy to get to the theme parks from here!

I recently stayed at BIG4 Gold Coast Holiday Park and honestly, it exceeded all my expectations!

We are French and visiting from New Caledonia, and we felt incredibly welcomed from the moment we arrived.

We booked a powered site for our car with electricity and water, and when we initially had an issue with our power connection, the staff were incredibly responsive and helpful. They came quickly to fix the problem, and everything worked perfectly afterward. Their professionalism and kindness really stood out.

Throughout our stay, the team was always available to answer our questions and guide us — they were patient, attentive, and made everything very easy for us.

The facilities are absolutely outstanding. The bathrooms and toilets are spotless — not just clean, but beautifully maintained, with unique touches like aquariums that make the place feel special. The kitchen and fridge areas are also extremely clean and very well organized.

The pool area is fantastic! With slides and fun water features, it’s perfect for kids, but also a great place for adults to relax and enjoy the atmosphere. It’s a very friendly environment where it’s easy to meet people and feel part of a community.

Overall, this park offers the perfect combination of comfort, cleanliness, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. We highly recommend it to anyone visiting the Gold Coast, we will definitely come back!
Great poolside cafe, spa, and amazing water park slides (my sons favourite)

BIG4 Gold Coast is a fantastic destination for keeping kids entertained for hours. There’s no shortage of activities to burn off energy, from the massive waterpark with multiple slides to the jumping pillow and wide open green spaces perfect for kicking a footy. The park has a very family-friendly atmosphere, with kids riding bikes and scooters throughout. On top of that, the facilities are excellent.

Staying in a caravan so can’t comment on rooms. But location is fantastic, close to everything the GC has to offer, the service is amazing with cafe opening at 7am offering fantastic coffee, amenities and clean. Pool and waterpark are loads of fun for the whole family & staff have been super friendly throughout the whole park. 10/10 and will definitely be back.
The atmosphere and amenities are fantastic and the restaurant great value pool and slides my kids loved spent most of time there
Kids love the place.

While the park itself is amazing especially for what it offers the children (one of the best we have been too) ,  the size of the caravan sites and space and the amenities are fantastic we unfortunately didn’t end on a great note when it came to help from the staff.  Our car broke down on the motorway and had to be towed to a mechanic, we were then told we couldn’t continue to stay at the park as they said we needed a car onsite with us that could tow our van. We then had to get a tow truck to remove the caravan from the park and our family with 2 children. We let them know the tow truck was on its way and had no assistance from staff on the best and easiest way for the tow truck driver to get out and it was not easy getting the size of the truck with our caravan out of the park. This shocked me as when we entered the park we had to wait for assistance to be shown to our site then nothing when we were stuck when leaving. We were even more shocked that we had to leave, after already being there for 5nights, no where to go due to not having a car even though they had the ability to keep us on our site for a further 4 nights before it was booked out.

I couldn't believe the water at the WaterPark was heated! It was awesome! No cueing for slides.

The staff have been super helpful and the room is lovely and clean!

This is our third and most impressive stay here. We’re well aware of the fantastic facilities but the service and staff have been so amazing and helpful. My AuDHD son wanted to surprise his dad with coffee from the nibbles cafe with his own money. He rode his scooter up but unfortunately he didn’t have enough money, the wonderful staff gave him the coffee anyway. Dad was stoked, and my son very pleased with himself. Thank you Nibbles Cafe staff, you made our day.
Accommodating staff, lovely new and set up safari tents! Perfect for our family!

I stayed in a family cabin and it was very comfortable. Mattress was really comfy and so were the pillows. Loved the convenience of the park and I didn’t have to leave the place, my three kids (age 4,6,9) were entertained the entire time. We only did a few of the activities and they loved them. Nice vibes with heaps of other kids there too. The coffee was really good too! Had a couple of cocktails and that was a really nice touch by the pool. Spent a lot of $$ but worth it for the memories my kids made.

We stayed here because it was so close to the theme parks and the extensive facilities looked amazing. It didn't disappoint. The kids were into everything - the pool, water park, jumping pillow and games room. Having the option to cook in our cabin or eat at the pool cafe made evenings hassle free. Movie World & Wet'n'Wild were a 20 minute walk or 3 minute bus ride from the bus stop outside the park gates. Highly recommend staying here if you're in the Gold Coast. We'll be back.
Camping for a few nights with the fam, awesome pool area and unreal facilities! Will definitely stay again!

This is the best caravan park I’ve been to anywhere in Australia. The pool is great and always the right temperature. The staff are friendly, the cafe is amazing, and the grounds are immaculate. Plus the weather is great and the theme parks are right there. Awesome!

We were pleasantly surprised by some unexpected features, such as being able to pre order dinner from the cafe online. The wide selection of food, drinks and dessert choices catered for everyone. Wood-fired pizzas, margaritas, cocktails and frappes. Being able to order food and having it delivered to your cabana by the pool is fantastic. They have all the other bases covered, clean accommodation, awesome pool and waterslides, kids activities, basketball court, footy oval and even a dog park! They’ve got it all here!
We stayed in a Cabin here for 2 nights. Great location, helpful and friemdly staff. Csnin overlooked the River.
Tallebudgera Tourist Park lived up to all our previous visits.   Incredible cabins, facilities and staff.   Can’t wait for our next stay
One of the best parks we have stayed in along the coast. Close enough but removed from the glitzy GC insanity. Awesome facilities, super staff.|We will be returning when we next venture up the coast.

We spent 2 nights here with a bunch of friends all camping. We chose an ensuite site for convenience. Awesome spot, right on the water. Kids went from beach, fishing, pool and scootering the whole time.

Beautiful location, lovely staff, but unfortunately the cabins are outdated, dirty, bathrooms are full of mould, damp, sticky, sand on the furniture and beds, etc… wouldn’t stay here again so no I do not recommend… we’ve stayed at multiple tourist parks around Australia and have our favorites, this one wasn’t up to standard.

Location is great. Hubby arranged a cabin for the weekend for a short staycation but the cabin was not very clean,  one single bunk had sand and socks in it, which was concerning, the shower had mould in the corners and the bottom of the glass was cloudy and if you scraped your nail on it, it came off,  2 of the blankets were dirty. We did tell reception who said they would get the sheets changed but we just put our daughter on the couch when they didn’t come.
Enjoyed my stay here and will definitely be back in the future
Nice and clean. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Beautiful spot on the creek. Lots of places to walk.  Loved the adult pool
EXCELLENT FACILITIES AND GREAT STAFF
Really nice sized caravan sites. Plenty of room to back a van in. Ample size to fit the van and car. Well maintained sites. Great amenities. Great pool. Great for kids. Will definitely return.

We loved our time at Tallebudgera Creek Caravan park. Our caravan site was well situated near the beach. We loved walking around the creek with a coffee in hand. We enjoyed the warm pool and the kids were never bored.
Tallebudgera’s Creek is one of our favourite parks. The location is perfect, the amenities first rate and staff communicative, so helpful and lovely!

Nice location, but unfortunately the experience was ruined by the staff. Their attitude was rude and unprofessional, which made the stay uncomfortable from start to finish. Hospitality should make guests feel welcome, not like a burden.

Do yourself a favour and book somewhere else.
Loved it and would definately stay again.

Tallebudgera Tourist Park is the go to destination if you are visiting the Gold Coast. Well located to visit all that the Gold Coast offers.  Convenient caravan sites all located close to the amenities. The amenity blocks are spotless with great showers which we love. An enclosed safe swimming area is conveniently located in the creek. We are kayakers and the creek offers interesting cruising. Finally the Tallebudgera Surf Club offers fantastic meals competetive prices with table service a few minutes walk from the park do your self a favour visit the club. As caravaners this park exceeds accepted standards. Enjoy!

We were lucky enough to stay right on the water at Site 25, and even though we only had two nights there, we honestly could have stayed so much longer.|The waterfront site was absolutely spectacular and worth every extra dollar. Stepping straight out of the van and into the swimming enclosure felt like a luxury holiday — it’s hard to imagine a better spot to relax and unwind. Our site come with double concrete slab, we ours did and I think some of the others had the synthetic turf as well, which was such a great touch. It meant no need to roll out the awning mat and helped keep the sand out of the van, making everything that little bit easier and cleaner.|What really made the stay even more memorable was the staff. They were incredibly friendly, welcoming, and genuinely cared about making sure everything was just right. Having them come around in the afternoon for a quick chat and to check in on guests was such a lovely personal touch.|I had been a little concerned about possible road noise with the park being on the Gold Coast Highway, but there was absolutely no need to worry. The park was impressively quiet and peaceful, which made the whole experience even better.
Really cool place, great location

A great location and helpful staff members. There aren't a lot of child facilities such as games room jumping pillow etc, but seeing as the beach is so close you can understand why. Facilities were clean and access was good

Me and a friend stayed  In our camper van for the night. The managers were  so lovely and friendly. We accidentally booked the wrong night, and they rang us and offered to move the stay for free when we didn't turn up. Super lovely site, clean toilets and showers, great access to the beach (also surf board hire), great laundry facilities, and a very cute little herb garden. It's a 20 dollar Uber to Sky Point and 10 dollars Uber to the dracula Cabaret show (a must-see). Overall, it was a great experience thanks to the lovely managers. They both truly care for the place and the customers needs ☺️ thank you so much it's a  5-star review from me.

Lee

Very happy with our stay, the caravan park, pools and splash pro are clean.

Able to get a cabana and sun lounge regularly even with a full pool area.

First time staying at this park and what an amazing experience. So many activities for the kids, the water park being a big hit.
Modern clean amenities, love the aquarium and music in the bathroom.
A big plus for us was being able to bring our fur kids who were welcome at the Nibbles Cafe - so we could enjoy a bite to eat, plus a huge dog park for them to let off steam.
Already planning our next holiday!

Really good location, freeway is close but quiet enough in the accommodation for it to not keep you awake. Amenities are great, the kids spent hours on the water slide and balloon. Service was quite reasonable considering how busy they were, all staff were friendly and the coffee is great

Public buses right out the front for family theme park travel. Well insulated clean and comfortable villas with temp controlled split systems. Water slides and combined splash park are entertaining our kids for HOURS! Thankyou!

Loads of seasonal activities here for all ages.
And pets are welcome too 🥰
Amenities are clean and tidy, and the grounds are easy to get around and maintained exceptionally well.
The staff are friendly and helpful.
Food and drinks are a bit pricey, but they have good deals, discounts, offers and incentives running all the time.
My family and I have been coming here for years, and will do so till my kids have their kids.
Definitely worth it for a great family vacation. ☺️🙏🏼

We used their premium campsite and were very happy with the experience.
- in and out process was really easy and the campsite was nice and clean.
- handy amenities, washing, common room, kitchen, dump site.
-game zone, pool and lots of other activities for kids.
-The place felt safe for kids to ride the bike.
- perfect location.

The only downside was it was little pricy for our budget but I think easter holiday you need to expect it.

Overall I was very happy with my stay there. Definitely recommend it.

Very nice accommodation even tho just tenting it lovely customer service and clean and enjoyable atmosphere, daughter from nz loves it and wants to make it a yearly trip also very nice to see koalas in there natural habitat a min walk away keep up the great work and the great food
One of the best Big 4 parks that we have visited! Great facilities, large sites, friendly staff, and plenty to keep the kids entertained!
Always a guaranteed great holiday. Staff are so friendly and location is amazing. We love coming here.

Great stay with young kids. Plenty of space and very clean. The pool is very busy and was really hard to use as we were a big group and didn’t have anywhere to sit. But the splash park/water slide area had plenty of space to gather and chill out.
Excellent for our family. Toddler to early teen aged children and they are all happy. So close to theme parks.
Great experience.
Great for families, just wish it was easier to get to the supermarket
Great place to say, very close to the theme parks, place itself has great amenities, we stayed in the cosy cabins, they are not too bad at all
Excellent park. Our boys enjoying their freedom
Having just left a different facility and now here at Big 4, they are miles apart. Great food, well priced and my kids are having a ball at the water park!
Favourite place to stay love the park and pool area. Stay here regularly.
Fantastic place to relax and unwind!
Such a great location for a caravan park!

The amenities were disgusting.  We stayed 3 weeks, I informed them of a toilet that did not flush and a broken toilet seat, and after 3 weeks still not fixed.
The shower heads are so corroded that you need to either dance around or stand against the wall to get wet.  I understand you are on the beach and corrosion happens, but so should maintenance.
Gutters need clearing so you don’t get soaked from the rain at the bathroom entrance while your entering the code to get in.

One plus, you are right on Talle Creek, which is beautiful.  Just don’t look behind you to the park, major disappointment.

Overall a huge disappointment for the Gold Coast.

This is our first time staying at the Big 4 in Gold Coast in our caravan and must say it’s the best caravan park we have stayed. There are so many activities for the kids and the waterpark/pool is elite. There’s even an onsite doggy daycare for our dog to stay while we head to the theme parks! Save your money. Seriously. We discovered our main bed was broken — sunken and slumped in the centre — at 10pm, after a full day of activity. We spent hours trying to sleep through it before finally giving up at 12:30am, packing our things, and driving home in the middle of the night. We didn't stay the second night. We didn't use the cabin the second day. We also only wanted a refund for one night.

What we got instead was Jenny, the Reservations Manager, armed with a policy that would make a medieval toll collector blush: "Any problems must be reported within the first hour of arrival." One hour. Sixty minutes. Never mind that we were out enjoying the property and only discovered a broken bed when we actually tried to sleep in it at night (the way beds are typically used). Because we only inspect our mattress visually the moment we pulled into the driveway, we had, according to Jenny, forfeited any right to complain.

Jenny then offered this gem of a comparison: "What if you were on a plane and the seat was uncomfortable — would you ask for a refund? They still got you from A to B." We pointed out that a more accurate analogy would be boarding the plane standing up, only discovering your broken seat at cruising altitude, suffering through it for hours, and then being forced to jump out mid-flight. She was unmoved.

The park was fully booked that night — no replacement cabin was available regardless — but Jenny still cited the existence of after-hours staff as proof that we could have been helped, conveniently ignoring that there was nothing they could actually do. When we called the next morning, we were told that because we hadn't called at midnight (where no one would have answered), no refund was possible. The second night we never spent? Also non-refundable, naturally. A fresh reason was produced for every question asked.

Here is what Big4's policy actually means in practice: management could lay a pile of towels on the floor, label it a bed, and as long as you don't notice and formally complain within 60 minutes of checking in, you are legally and morally — by their reckoning — obligated to pay for your entire booking. Every night. Whether you slept there or not.

This isn't a hospitality business. It's a policy document with cabins attached. Don't stay here. Happy Easter.

What truly sets this holoday park apart is the attention to detail. Every corner is designed for comfort and beauty, and the staff’s genuine warmth makes you feel like family. If 5 stars are for luxury, 6 stars are for the unforgettable memories created here.

We recently stayed at a BIG4 Holiday Park for the weekend, and unfortunately our experience was very disappointing from start to finish.

We have been coming here for over 5 years and have never had a problem before, which makes this experience even more upsetting.

We had this trip booked well in advance, but only found out on the morning of our stay that the kitchen was under renovation and there would be a very limited menu. This was extremely frustrating, especially as we have a child who requires gluten-free options — there was essentially nothing available for her to eat. Had we been informed earlier, we absolutely would have rescheduled.

On arrival, we were also given the wrong number of wristbands, which added to the disorganisation.

The most upsetting part of our stay, however, was the handling of a payment in the office. I asked to pay a $100 bond for a birthday party booking, and without clearly confirming the amount, I was charged $1250 — the full amount of the party. I tapped my card while we were mid-conversation and didn’t realise the amount that had been processed until afterwards. When I raised this, there was no understanding or empathy shown. I was simply told it was done and that I shouldn’t have tapped my card.

To make matters worse, the manager, Georgina Honda, was extremely dismissive and disrespectful towards both myself and my sister-in-law. Rather than trying to resolve the situation, she told us she had cancelled all future bookings and that we were “blacklisted.” For what — being understandably upset that $1250 was taken from my business account instead of $100?

If the situation were reversed and $1250 was unexpectedly taken from them, I’m sure they would feel just as upset. Taking a moment to understand our side would have gone a long way, but unfortunately that care just wasn’t there.

Overall, this experience left us feeling very let down. Better communication, organisation, and customer care are really needed.

Our recent stay at Tallebudgera Creek Caravan Park was unfortunately overshadowed by an incident that raises real concerns about the professionalism of the staff.

Checkout is at 10:00 AM, and as first-time campervan users, it took us longer than expected to pack up. We received two calls from reception, and we informed them both times that we were already in the process of leaving and doing our best.

At around 11:15 AM, a male staff member arrived at our site. Instead of offering assistance, patience, or simply a polite reminder, he chose to speak to us in a dismissive and confrontational way. His exact words were:

“We will put a note on your file, so don’t bother booking us again.”

This was entirely unnecessary and deeply unprofessional. A hospitality business should never make guests feel unwelcome, especially when they are clearly trying to comply and when the situation could have been handled with basic courtesy.

We fully acknowledge the checkout time. What we cannot accept is the attitude. There was no attempt to understand, no offer of help, and no respect shown in the interaction. Being told not to return—by a staff member whose job is to represent the park—was astonishing.

Because of this, we will not be returning, and we hope management takes this seriously. A single conversation delivered with respect could have changed the entire experience. Instead, it revealed a service culture that requires urgent attention.

Lin

Here is the response after seeing yours.
First, I was not sitting and having breakfast when staff came to the site. My three young kids had eaten earlier; I was already on the ground packing up the campervan as fast as I could. I fully accept that we were late checking out – that was our mistake.

Second, I strongly disagree with the claim that I was “aggressive and disrespectful.” The staff member approached with a very impatient attitude, and my response was simply, “Yes, you’ve reminded us for the third time, I know,” while I kept packing. I did not swear, yell or threaten anyone. Our neighbour directly opposite us, Steve (who checked out the same Monday), witnessed the whole interaction and can confirm this.

I understand enforcing checkout times, but being unfairly labelled as aggressive and then told I’m not welcome back, based solely on one staff member’s version of events, is extremely upsetting. Because of the way this was handled, I will not be returning.

Location = 5/5 • Waterfront Superior Cabin = 3/5
Being on the Tully River was great, awesome location, have always wanted to stay in one of the cabins so was happy when it worked out for this weekend. We stayed for 3 nights in a 2 Bedroom Waterfront Superior Cabin. We were unfortunately very annoyed and disappointed with the lack of privacy in the cabin. There are NO blinds/curtains on the bathroom window at all - meaning at night time you could see into the bathroom clearly despite the window having a glaze on it. See our photo attached) We couldn’t stand in the bathroom naked before or after showering! It’s ridiculous. Also no blockout blinds (only light filtering) on the large loungeroom and kitchen windows so again at night anyone could see in clearly. We had walking paths on both sides of our cabin that campers used often which took them right past our windows at head height. Could even see directly into neighbours cabin windows. Noone wants that. Privacy is the bare minimum you expect in accommodation. And for the price of these cabins, you should get it.
Another issue was no wifi at all. And noone notified us of this at time of booking or checking in. So while the cabin was spacious, and had mostly everything we needed, the privacy was a real issue and the reason we unfortunately would not book and stay again.

Nestled in the heart of the Gold Coast, the Big 4 Caravan Park in Helensvale offers an unparalleled experience for travelers seeking comfort and adventure. From the moment you arrive, the warm and welcoming atmosphere makes you feel right at home. The park is impeccably maintained, with spacious and clean amenities that cater to every need. Whether you're setting up in a cozy cabin or pitching a tent, the surrounding lush greenery and well-thought-out layout create a serene retreat.

But what truly sets this place apart is its proximity to local attractions, making it an ideal base for exploring the Gold Coast. You'll find yourself just a stone's throw away from thrilling theme parks, pristine beaches, and vibrant shopping districts.

Now, let's talk about Nibbles Café, a hidden gem adjacent to the park. This charming café has quickly risen to the top of my list for the best meals in town. The menu is a delightful fusion of flavors, showcasing fresh, locally sourced ingredients. Whether you're craving a hearty breakfast to kickstart your day or a light lunch to refuel, Nibbles Café has something for everyone. Their signature dishes are bursting with flavor, and the presentation is simply top-notch.

And then there's the coffee—oh, the coffee! I can honestly say I’ve never tasted anything quite like it on the Gold Coast. Each cup is brewed to perfection, with rich aromas and a velvety texture that dances on your palate. It's the perfect companion to their scrumptious pastries, making for a delightful morning ritual.

In summary, whether you're staying at the Big 4 Caravan Park or just visiting Nibbles Café, you’re in for a treat. The combination of a welcoming environment, exceptional meals, and outstanding coffee makes this destination a must-visit. If you're looking for a memorable getaway and a culinary experience that will leave you wanting more, look no further. I can’t wait to return!
